title: iDisco Immunolabeling in Brown Adipose Tissue (BAT)
author: Seoeun Lee
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.wqmfdu6

steps.instruction: Anesthetize the mouse, perfuse with 20ml Saline and 4% PFA in 0.1M PB
Dissect BAT, carefully remove white adipose tissue surrounding the BAT. The two bilateral depots can be left connected or separated, as desired
Fix in 4% PFA in 0.1M PB at 4°C, overnight with shaking, then RT 1h
Wash in PBS with shaking: RT 30min x 3times
Dehydrate with methanol/H2O series: 20%, 40%, 60%, 80%, 100%; at RT for 1h each with shaking
Wash further with 100% methanol for 1h at RT and then chill the sample at 4°C with shaking
Overnight incubation, with shaking, in 66% DCM / 33% methanol / 1% deionized water at RT
Wash twice in 100% methanol at RT with shaking, and then chill the sample at 4°C
Bleach in chilled fresh 5% H 2 O 2 in methanol (1 volume 30% H 2 O 2 to 5 volumes MeOH), overnight at 4°C with shaking
Rehydrate with methanol/H2O series: 80%, 60%, 40%, 20%, PBS; 1h each at RT with shaking
Wash in PTx.2 (0.2% TritonX-100 in PBS) for 1h x2 at RT with shaking
Incubate samples in Permeabilization Solution (40ml PTx.2 + 10ml DMSO + 1.15g glycine), at 37°C with shaking for 2 days
Block in Blocking Solution (42ml PT2.x + 3ml Donkey Serum + 5ml DMSO) at 37°C with shaking for 2 days

Incubate with primary antibody in PTwH (0.2% Tween-20 in PBS + 0.1% of 10mg/ml Heparin stock solution in PBS)/5%DMSO/3% Donkey Serum, at 37°C with shaking for 7 days *Validated primary antibodies - Beta 3 tubulin (Abcam ab18207. 1:400 dilution) - Tyrosine Hydroxylase (Millipore AB152, 1:400 dilution) - Pgp9.5 (Abcam ab108986, 1:400 dilution)
Wash in PTwH for 4-5 times (1-2 hours each) until the next day at RT with shaking

Incubate with secondary antibody in PTwH/3% Donkey Serum, at 37°C with shaking for 7 days - Centrifue secondary antibody at 20000g for 10 minutes before use - Use Amber tube from this step forward - Wavelength longer than 555 (ex. AF555, AF647) is recommended
Wash in PTwH for 4-5 times (1-2 hours each) until the next day at RT with shaking
Dehydrate with methanol/H2O series: 20%, 40%, 60%, 80%, 100%; at RT for 1h each with shaking. Ption to leave onernight at this point, is desired
3h incubation with shaking, in 66% DCM / 33% methanol / 1% deionized water at RT
Incubate in 100% DCM for 15 minutes twice at RT with shaking to wash the methanol

Incubate in DiBenzyl Ether (no shaking). The tube should be filled almost completely with DBE to prevent the air from oxidizing the sample. Before imaging, invert the tube a couple of time to finish mixing the solution

The cleared sample should be tranferred to a chamber of an appropriate size (we create one with a 3D printer), sealed on a coverglass with Kwik-sil epoxy (VWR). This chamber is then mounted on Attofluor cell chamber (Thermofisher A7816) and filled with DBE
We typically use a Nikon Ti Eclipse inverted microscope for scanning confocal microscopy, but a resonance scanner is recommended for faster imaging
